title: hoya crassicaulis subsp. crassicaulis
intro: Hoya crassicaulis subsp. crassicaulis is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a type of waxflower or coral hoya. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hoya crassicaulis subsp. crassicaulis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
